title: Holidays in Hokkaido
details: Highlights: Sapporo Clock Tower, Tanukikoji Shopping Street, Otaru Canal, Sakaimachi Music Box Street, Shiroi Koibito Chocolate Park, Nijo Morning Market, Sapporo Beer Museum, Hokkaido Shrine, Teine Ski Resort, Mitsui Premium Outlet, and Odori Park Snow Festival.
flyer: assets/data/packages/korea_japan/Hokkaido Snow Festival 2026/HOLIDAYS IN HOKKAIDO SNOW FESTIVAL.pdf

itinerary.day_title: Day 1: Manila ✈ Haneda ✈ Chitose – Sapporo (Meals on Board)
itinerary.day_details: Check-in at NAIA Terminal 1 for Japan Airlines flight to Haneda and onward to Chitose. Enjoy in-flight amenities. Flight Details: JL078 MNL–HND 23:30–04:25 / JL503 HND–CTS 07:30–09:00.
Arrival at Shin-Chitose Airport. Meet and greet your Japanese tour guide. Transfer to Sapporo (approx. 1 hr 10 mins). Visit Clock Tower and Tanukikoji Shopping Street. Hotel check-in and dinner.

Transfer to Otaru (approx. 1 hr 10 mins). Visit Otaru Canal and Sakaimachi Music Box Street (Music Box Museum, Kitaichi Glass, LeTAO, etc.). Return to Sapporo (approx. 1 hr) and visit Shiroi Koibito Chocolate Park (admission included). Dinner and overnight in Sapporo.

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Sapporo City Tour & Teine Ski Resort (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Visit Nijo Morning Market, Sapporo Beer Museum, and Hokkaido Shrine. Transfer to Teine Ski Resort (approx. 40 mins) and enjoy the Snow Park with sledding (admission included). Note: Ski and snowboard not included. Dinner and overnight.
Breakfast at hotel. Transfer to Kitahiroshima (approx. 50 mins). Enjoy shopping at Mitsui Premium Outlet until 5PM. Return to Sapporo (approx. 50 mins). Overnight in Sapporo.

itinerary.day_title: Day 6: Odori Park Snow Festival & Departure (B)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast and hotel check-out by 3PM. Visit the World Snow Festival in Odori Park. Enjoy spectacular snow and ice sculptures with free time to explore. Transfer to Shin-Chitose Airport (approx. 1 hr 10 mins). Flight Details: JL528 CTS–HND 21:05–22:50 / JL077 HND–MNL 01:50–05:45.
Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home!

inclusions: 3 lunches and 3 dinners as per itinerary
Tours and entrance fees as indicated
Tipping for guide and driver included
Private coach for airport and hotel transfers
extra_details: Mode of Payment: $250 first down payment to reserve a slot, $250 second down payment after one month.
Notes: Official Sapporo Snow Festival runs February 4–11, 2026.
Itinerary order may change depending on weather conditions or operational reasons.
flight_details: Japan Airlines – JL078 MNL–HND 23:30–04:25 / JL503 HND–CTS 07:30–09:00 / JL528 CTS–HND 21:05–22:50 / JL077 HND–MNL 01:50–05:45
